features: In-ground hydraulic hose routing between posts
Under-slab hose installation eliminates above-ground hose runs
Compatible with multiple 2-post lift models and ML-220
Uses standard 4 inch PVC tubing for conduit
Smooth 90 degree elbows at both ends for hose protection
Standard new slab recommendation size shown
notes: 4 inch diameter PVC tubing to be provided by others
Smooth 90 degree elbow typical at both ends
Compatible with LC-12, LMF-12, TP-15, TP-16, TP-18, ML-220
Hoses routed under slab between column bases
Standard size new slab recommendation shown in drawing
